mismatches.detail: D2.0-06 §1.1 Stage 2 Chunk: '문서를 검색 단위(청크)로 분할 (크기/오버랩 설정 포함)'. The SOT does not explicitly specify 300~500tok. PART2 adds this specific range. Checking CLAUDE.md §7.4: 'Chunk(300~500tok)'. So this comes from CLAUDE.md which is an authoritative derived source. Considered match.

mismatches.fact: PART2 Hybrid Search Dense weight alpha=0.7, Sparse=0.3
mismatches.detail: PART2 claims these values come from 'D2.0-06 L768 정본'. Searched D2.0-06 for alpha/dense/sparse weight parameters but could not find explicit 0.7/0.3 values in the sections read. These may be in a section not read or may be a PART2 addition. Flagged as unverifiable from available SOT text.

mismatches.fact: PART2 DCL QoD threshold: >= 0.5 for RAG insertion
mismatches.detail: D2.0-06 §2.5.2 states 'QoD < 0.4: L2/L3 저장 금지'. PART2 §6.10.2 uses QoD >= 0.5 threshold for DCL RAG insertion. The thresholds are different: SOT uses 0.4 as floor for L2/L3, PART2 uses 0.5 for DCL data. These are different contexts (general memory vs DCL), so may be intentionally different, but the relationship should be clarified.

match_details.fact: L1 Project Memory: TTL=90 days, project_id isolation
match_details.detail: SOT §2.1: 'L1: 90일 (TTL, 기본); Project 단위 30일 연장 가능'. Match.

match_details.fact: B-1 Episodic -> L1, B-2 Procedural -> L3, B-3 Semantic -> L2, B-4 Working -> L0

match_details.detail: SOT §1.1: 6 stages with same names. Match.

match_details.fact: V1 Vector DB: Chroma local, BGE-M3 1024dim
Memory search order: L0 -> L1 -> L2 -> L3

match_details.detail: SOT S7D-040: 'L1→L2: 재참조 3회 이상 OR QoD ≥ 0.7'. Match.
SOT §2.3 V2 L2: '저장 시 승인 필수 (S03-MOD-001 확정)'. Match.
CLAUDE.md §15: 'PII 마스킹: V1=정규식, V2+=NER 모델+문맥 분류기'. Match.

match_details.fact: Guardrails 4-Layer: L1(NeMo) + L2(Guardrails AI) + L3(LlamaGuard) + L4(post-audit, V2+)
match_details.detail: SOT §11.1.2: L1 NeMo Guardrails, L2 Guardrails AI, L3 LlamaGuard, L4 Post-delivery Audit. Match.
PART2 §6.5 lists exactly 15 security items. Count verified.

missing.sot_fact: VectorStore adapter interface minimum contract: upsert, search (top_k default=10), delete, get_by_id
missing.detail: SOT §2.2-A defines VectorStore adapter interface with specific method signatures and top_k defaults (10 design, 5 API). PART2 does not describe this adapter interface contract.

missing.sot_fact: L3 Procedural Memory detailed lifecycle: draft->approved->active->deprecated, with D7 Approval Gate
missing.detail: PART2 §Phase2 item 8 mentions 'activation_state 관리' for B-3 Decay. SOT §2.4 has extensive L3 lifecycle rules. PART2 does not detail L3 lifecycle in Phase 2.

missing.sot_fact: Memory deduplication: cosine > 0.95 threshold, weekly batch + real-time check
missing.detail: SOT S7D-044 defines memory deduplication with 0.95 threshold and scheduling. PART2 does not mention memory deduplication as a Phase 2 implementation item.

missing.sot_fact: Memory demotion algorithm: L2->L3 90d unreferenced, L3->Archive 180d unreferenced (V2+)
missing.detail: SOT S7D-041 defines memory demotion/deletion algorithm with specific day thresholds. PART2 does not include demotion algorithm in Phase 2 items.

check_details.detail: PART2 L1352-1359: B-L mapping table. Exact match.
SOT §1.1: '운영 한계: 문서 15개 / 청크 30개'. PART2 does not mention these operation limits.
PART2 mentions QoD thresholds but does not list the 3 component fields (freshness, reliability, completeness) explicitly in Phase 2 section.

check_details.sot_fact: Memory search result: per-layer 5, total 20 candidates -> reranker -> top 5
check_details.detail: SOT S7D-042: '레이어당 5개, 총 20개 후보 → reranker → top 5'. PART2 does not specify these search result limits.

check_details.sot_fact: L0 session buffer: in-memory list, LLM context 80%, auto-summarize at 70%
check_details.detail: SOT S7D-035: 'LLM context 80%, 70% 초과 시 자동 요약'. PART2 does not detail L0 buffer management parameters.

check_details.sot_fact: Memory promotion scoring: access_count*0.4 + recency*0.3 + confidence*0.3
check_details.detail: SOT S7D-040 defines promotion_score formula. PART2 does not include this formula.

check_details.sot_fact: V1 memory activation: L0 active, L1 selective, L2 OFF, L3 OFF
check_details.detail: PART2 Phase 2 items 1-2 implement L0 and L1. Phase 2 does not include L2/L3 active items. Consistent with SOT.
PART2 L1347: '대화 내보내기/가져오기: JSON/Markdown export, import'. Match (format slightly different: SOT says JSON/SQLite, PART2 says JSON/Markdown).

check_details.sot_fact: Deny policy: no long-term storage, vector insertion absolutely forbidden
check_details.detail: PART2 context addresses deny rules through CLAUDE.md §15: 'QoD < 0.4 → L2 벡터삽입 금지'. Present.

check_details.sot_fact: Redis for L0 cache/session acceleration only, not for L1/L2 primary storage
check_details.detail: SOT §2.2: 'Redis는 L0 캐시/세션 가속용으로만 허용'. PART2 does not mention Redis L0 cache constraint.

findings.description: RAG operation limits (15 documents / 30 chunks) from SOT D2.0-06 §1.1 not mentioned in PART2 Phase 2 section.
findings.evidence: SOT §1.1: '운영 한계: 문서 15개 / 청크 30개'. PART2 V1-Phase 2 lists RAG pipeline stages but omits these operational limits.

findings.description: Memory search result limits (per-layer 5, total 20 -> reranker -> top 5) from SOT S7D-042 not specified in PART2.
findings.evidence: SOT S7D-042: '레이어당 5개, 총 20개 후보 → reranker → top 5'. PART2 omits this.

findings.description: Memory export format: SOT S7D-008 says JSON/SQLite, PART2 says JSON/Markdown. Minor format discrepancy.
findings.evidence: SOT S7D-008: 'JSON/SQLite 형식으로 전체 메모리 내보내기'. PART2 L1347: 'JSON/Markdown export'.

findings.description: L0 session buffer management parameters (80% context, 70% auto-summarize) from SOT S7D-035 not detailed in PART2.
findings.evidence: SOT S7D-035: 'LLM context 80%, 70% 초과 시 자동 요약'. PART2 only mentions 'SQLite, TTL=session_end' for L0.

findings.description: Memory promotion scoring formula (access_count*0.4 + recency*0.3 + confidence*0.3) from SOT S7D-040 not documented in PART2.
findings.evidence: SOT S7D-040 defines promotion_score formula. PART2 does not include implementation details for memory promotion scoring.

findings.description: VectorStore adapter interface contract (upsert, search with top_k defaults, delete, get_by_id) from SOT D2.0-06 §2.2-A not documented in PART2 Phase 2.
findings.evidence: SOT §2.2-A defines minimum adapter contract with 4 methods and specific defaults. PART2 mentions Chroma but not the adapter interface.

findings.description: DCL QoD threshold (0.5) in PART2 differs from general memory QoD floor (0.4) in SOT. The relationship between these thresholds is not clarified.
findings.evidence: PART2 L3134: 'DCL QoD >= 0.5 → RAG 삽입'. SOT §2.5.2: 'QoD < 0.4: L2/L3 저장 금지'. Different contexts but threshold relationship unclear.
